description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a deep red cover and gold trim along the edges, giving it a distinguished and classic appearance. The cover features a prominent, stylized cream-colored emblem or cross-like symbol in the center, which stands out against the rich red background. The book's pages are visible along the sides, appearing white and tightly bound, suggesting a hardcover format. The gold edging continues around the spine and corners, adding a touch of elegance and durability. The surface of the cover has a slightly glossy finish, reflecting light subtly. There are no visible illustrations, text, or publisher logos on the cover or spine.
description: A thick, red hardcover book with gold trim and a central cream-colored emblem on the cover. The pages are white and the cover has a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the short edge, showing the gold-trimmed spine and the white pages, with the cream emblem centered on the red cover.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the long side, displaying the full length of the white pages and the gold trim along the top and bottom edges.
description_view_2: The opposite short edge is visible, again showing the gold trim and the thickness of the white pages, with the emblem on the cover.
description_view_3: The back cover is shown, mostly plain red with gold trim and no visible emblem or markings.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is gold-trimmed and plain, with no visible text or decorative elements.
